info.name: CRM API
info.description:
Backend API for CRM (**Flask**). Set {{baseUrl}} (e.g. http://localhost:5000). Use **Login** to set {{token}}; send **Authorization: Bearer {{token}}** on protected routes.

## RBAC
- **Global role `admin`**: full JWT access to most routes; **sidebar/nav** still uses **explicit RBAC** (`GET /api/rbac/me` → `navPageKeys`) except global admins see all modules.
- **Per-module access** (`sales`, `tasks`, `leaves`, …): enforced per endpoint. Typical scopes:
  - **Sales** (`pageKey: sales`): **full scope** = global admin *or* RBAC **admin** column for Sales → all funnel deals, orders, renewals. **User scope** = funnel/renewals where **company KAM** is you; **orders** only if **assignTo** or **forwardedTo** is you.
  - **Leaves** (`pageKey: leaves`): RBAC **admin** vs **user** treated the same for data scope; **extra visibility** via **HR module** (`can_access_page(hr)`) or **reporting manager** (`/api/leaves/team`, approve/reject).
- **RBAC API** (`/api/rbac/*`): most routes require **global admin** (`require_admin`), not only a matrix cell.

## Resources
Auth, **RBAC**, Users, Companies, Contacts, Tasks, **Sales** (funnel), **Orders**, **Renewals**, Notifications, Shifts, **Attendance**, **Leaves**, HR, Status config, Company profile, Currencies, Expense purposes, Expenses (bin/restore), Account particulars, Accounts, Departments, Designations.

## Leaves
- **Balances** `GET/PUT /api/leaves/balances/:userId`: **self**, **HR module access**, or employee’s **reporting manager** (not global-admin-only).
- **Apply**: `durationType`: `single_day` | `half_day` | `multiple_day`; `half_day` needs `halfDayPeriod`: `first_half` | `second_half`.
- **All leaves** `GET /api/leaves/all`: **global admin OR HR module access** (HR calendar).
- **Approve / reject**: **HR** or **reporting manager** for that employee (not global admin alone).
- **Leave types / weekends / holidays** (mutations): **global admin OR HR module access** (`require_admin_or_hr_access`).

## Attendance
Users need **shift** on HR. Without shift: `GET /api/attendance/today` may return `hasShiftAssigned: false`; check-in/out can return **422**.

request.description: Returns user, token, expiresAt. Token is saved to collection variable {{token}}.
Revoke current token (optional).
Logged-in user changes own password. Requires Bearer token.

item.name: RBAC
item.description: Per-module permissions. **Most routes require global JWT role `admin`.** Authenticated users may call **GET /pages** and **GET /me**.

request.description: Canonical `pageKey` + label list for Settings / clients. Requires authentication.
Returns `effective` (pageKey → access: none|user|admin) and `navPageKeys` for sidebar. Global admin: all modules in nav.
Global admin. Module × user grid of explicit assignments.
Upsert one assignment. `accessType`: `admin` | `user`. Returns updated assignment matrix.
Global admin. Pages list + default matrix for roles `admin` and `user`.
Replace role template defaults. `matrix.admin` / `matrix.user`: arrays of { pageKey, accessType }.
Global admin. Effective permissions + explicit overrides for one user.
Replace per-user overrides (full list). accessType: none | user | admin.
Remove explicit override for one pageKey (example URL uses `sales`). Global admin.
Returns all users.
Replace {{userId}} with actual user ID.
Logged-in user updates own name/phone. Requires Bearer.
Admin only. Sends welcome email. role: admin | user.
Admin only. Replace {{userId}}.
Admin only. Replace {{userId}}.
Query params: search, country, kamUserId (optional).
currencyId and kamUserId required. Get currencyId from GET /api/currencies.
Replace {{companyId}}.
Replace {{companyId}}. currencyId optional.
Replace {{companyId}}.
Query params: companyId, search (optional).
name, companyId, mobile required.
Replace {{contactId}}.
Replace {{contactId}}.
Replace {{contactId}}.
Query params: status, companyId, assignToUserId, assignByUserId, search (optional).
title, companyId, dueDatetime required. dueDatetime: ISO 8601.

Replace {{taskId}}. actorUserId optional for activity log.

item.name: Sales
item.description: Funnel deals. Requires **Sales** module access (`401`/`403` if missing). **Full scope**: all deals. **User scope**: companies where **you are KAM**. `createdByUserId` on create is set from JWT.

request.description: Query: status, companyId, category, createdByUserId, search. User scope pre-filters to your KAM companies.
companyId, prospect, expectedClosingDate required. You must be **KAM** on the company unless full Sales scope. Server sets createdByUserId.
Replace {{saleId}}.
Replace {{saleId}}.
Replace {{saleId}}. Creates status log.
Replace {{saleId}}. Returns status change logs.
Replace {{saleId}}.
Replace {{saleId}}. title and date required.
Replace {{saleId}} and {{activityId}}.
Replace {{saleId}} and {{activityId}}.
Replace {{saleId}}.

item.name: Orders
item.description: Sales orders. Requires **Sales module** access (`403` if none). **Full scope** (global admin or Sales RBAC admin): all orders + filters. **User scope**: only orders where you are **assignTo** or **forwardedTo**.

request.description: Query: companyId, salesId, status, nextAction, deliveryDateFrom/To, nextActionDateFrom/To. Full scope only: assignToUserId (or legacy assignTo) filter.

Requires company **KAM** = you unless full Sales scope. `createdByUserId` set by server. Optional `finalizeCloseWon` + `closedWonStatus` to close the linked deal. `attachments`: array of { fileName, data } data URLs.
Update status / next to do / next action date / forward. Values must match active Status config. **forwardedTo**: full scope, assignee, or current forward target only.

item.name: Renewals
item.description: Renewal pipeline. Same **Sales** RBAC as funnel (`403` without Sales). **Full scope**: all renewals. **User scope**: rows where **kamUserId** snapshot = you.

request.description: Optional filters. User scope ignores other users’ rows.
Company must be one you can access as **KAM** (unless full scope). `kamUserId` stored from company.
Replace {{renewalId}}.
Full payload like create.
Soft-delete (bin).
Soft-deleted renewals visible to you by scope.
Body: `ids` array of renewal ids. Restores rows you may access.
Get notifications for the current logged-in user.
Mark a specific notification as read.
Mark all notifications as read for the current user.
Delete a specific notification.

item.name: Shifts
item.description: Employees should be assigned to a shift for attendance. Create/update shifts with `employeeIds` or use **Assign shift**.

request.description: Get all configured shifts.
Admin only. Create a new shift. weekendDays: 0=Mon, 6=Sun.
Admin only. Update shift details and employee assignments.
Admin only. Deletes the shift and clears shift assignment for any employees on it.
Admin only. Assign a user to a shift (or remove if shiftId is null).

item.name: Attendance
item.description: Check-in and check-out require an **assigned shift** (see HR / Shifts). If the user has no shift: GET /today returns `status: no_shift` and `hasShiftAssigned: false`; POST check-in or check-out returns **422** with `{ "error": "..." }`.

request.description: Today's row for the current user. Includes `hasShiftAssigned`, `isWeekend`, `isHoliday` when synthetic. If no shift and no row: `status` may be `no_shift`.
Body: `location` (required). Late/present uses the user's **shift** start + grace. **422** if not assigned to a shift. **400** if weekend for shift or already checked in.
Body: `location` (required). Must have checked in first. **422** if not assigned to a shift.
Same as other periods; `period=today` returns today's record(s) for the current user after ensuring rows exist for the range.
Get attendance records for the current user. Query **period**: today, yesterday, week, last_week, month, last_month, year, last_year.
Admin only. Get attendance records for all users or filtered by userId.
Admin only. Initialize attendance records for today for all active employees.

item.name: Leaves
item.description: Authenticated users on most routes. See collection **info** for balances, `/all`, approve/reject, and HR vs global admin.

request.description: Get all active leave types.
Global **admin** or **HR module** access. Inactive types included.
Global admin or HR module access.
Global admin or HR module access.
Global admin or HR module access. Cannot delete if used by requests.
Returns `{ userId, balances }` with credited/remaining fields. Allowed: **self**, **HR module access**, or the employee’s **reporting manager**.
Upsert per-leave-type day balances for an employee. Body: non-empty `balances` array of `{ leaveTypeId, balance }` (balance ≥ 0). Same auth as GET balances.

Apply for leave. **durationType** (required): `single_day` | `half_day` | `multiple_day`. For `single_day`/`half_day` set `startDate` and same `endDate` if needed; for `multiple_day` set both dates. For **half_day** add `halfDayPeriod`: `first_half` | `second_half`. Conflicting dates return 400 with `conflicts`. Extra days beyond quota are stored as `additionalLeaveDays` on the leave.
Get leave requests for the current user.
**Global admin OR HR module access** (not Sales). Query: **startDate**, **endDate** (YYYY-MM-DD), **userIds** (comma-separated).
Get leave requests for employees managed by the current user.
Returns isReportingManager and teamSize for the current user (HR reporting-manager relationships).
Working days (weekends/holidays per shift). Optional **userId**: **HR** any user; **reporting manager** only direct reports; same user always; global admin alone is **not** enough unless HR.
**HR module access** or **reporting manager** for that employee. Not global-admin-only.
Reason required. Same auth as approve.
**Applicant**, **HR**, or **reporting manager** for that employee. Includes attachment data when applicable.
Update a **pending** leave (owner only). Same fields as apply: `durationType`, dates, optional `halfDayPeriod` for half_day.
Get all configured global weekend days.
Global admin or HR module access. `dayOfWeek` 0=Mon … 6=Sun.
Global admin or HR module access.
Get all configured holidays.
Global admin or HR module access. **startDate** / **endDate** (YYYY-MM-DD).
Global admin or HR module access.
Global admin or HR module access.

item.name: HR
item.description: All routes use **global admin OR HR module access** (`require_admin_or_hr_access`).

request.description: Full HR info for a user (history, certs, contacts).

Create employment history entry.
Update employment history entry.
Delete employment history entry.
Create academic certification entry.
Update academic certification entry.
Delete academic certification entry.
Create emergency contact entry.

Delete emergency contact entry.

item.name: Status config
item.description: GET is public. POST/PATCH/DELETE require **global JWT admin**.

request.description: Returns taskStatuses, salesCategories, salesStatuses (strings), **orderStatuses** and **orderNextTodos** as `{ value, isActive }[]`. No auth.
Global admin. **group**: taskStatuses | salesCategories | salesStatuses | **orderStatuses** | **orderNextTodos**. value: lower-case, spaces→underscores.
Toggle **isActive** for **orderStatuses** or **orderNextTodos** only. Body: group, value, isActive.
Global admin. **group** + **value** in body. For task/sales groups, cannot delete last item in group.
Returns all currencies. No auth required for GET.
Admin only. code and name required.
Replace {{currencyId}}.
Admin only. Replace {{currencyId}}. All fields optional.
Admin only. Replace {{currencyId}}.
Single org profile for Settings. No auth required for GET.
Admin only. All fields optional. logo: base64 data URL or null.
Returns all expense purposes, ordered by sort_order then name. No auth required for GET.
Admin only. name required. sortOrder and isActive optional.
Replace {{expensePurposeId}}.
Admin only. Replace {{expensePurposeId}}. All fields optional.
Admin only. Replace {{expensePurposeId}}.

item.name: Expenses
item.description: DELETE soft-deletes to the **bin**. Use **List expenses (bin)**, **Bulk soft delete**, **Restore** for recycle-bin flows.

request.description: Admin: all expenses. User: only their own (createdByUserId = current user).
companyId, date, amount required. tripType: single_trip | round_trip. amountReturn required for round_trip. status: unpaid | paid. createdByUserId set from current user.
Replace {{expenseId}}. Users can only view their own expenses (unless admin).
Replace {{expenseId}}. Users can only update their own expenses (unless admin). All fields optional.
Replace {{expenseId}}. Users can only delete their own expenses (unless admin).
Soft-deleted expenses. Admin: all. User: own only.
Soft-delete multiple active expenses. Admin: any. User: own only. Body: non-empty ids array.
Restore soft-deleted expenses. Admin: any. User: own only. Body: non-empty ids array.
Query param: type (received|expense, optional). Returns all if not specified. Ordered by sort_order, name.
Admin only. name and type (received|expense) required. sortOrder optional.
Replace {{accountParticularId}}.
Admin only. Replace {{accountParticularId}}. All fields optional.
Admin only. Replace {{accountParticularId}}.
Query params: from, to (date filters, optional). Returns all entries, last added first.

Admin only. date, type (received|expense), amount required. paidTo required for expense. Voucher auto-generated. Received: paidBy=AppTriangle, paidTo=Petty Cash. Expense: paidBy=Petty Cash, paidTo=user input. attachmentData: base64 string (optional).
Replace {{accountEntryId}}. Returns entry with attachmentData if present.
Admin only. Replace {{accountEntryId}}. Voucher not changed. All fields optional. Can also use amountDebit/amountCredit/paidBy/paidTo directly.
Admin only. Replace {{accountEntryId}}.
List all departments, sorted by sort_order then name. No auth required for read.

Admin only. Update a department.
Admin only. Delete a department.
List all designations, sorted by sort_order then name. No auth required for read.
